Video.summary: Learn how history's greatest colonial empire came about.

Video.title: The Sun Never Set

Image.alt: The Sun Never Set
The Sun Never Set

Video.summary: See how accelerating scientific knowledge connected to British exploration.

Video.summary: Step back to Anglo-Saxon England to see what makes this period of history so captivating.
